contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Credentialing platform: three fixes for orphan-URL UX + payload extraction bug
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/103
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/30
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/294
  
  Details:
  Three small fixes after Gary hit the capoeira → credentials handoff and the system surfaced several distinct UX + correctness bugs:
  
  ## Shipped (3 PRs, all merged)
  - truesight_me_beta PR #103 — credentials/index.html. (a) Alias redirect: '#pk-wR9zU8JMnEz1' now resolves via _cache/aliases.json to the canonical slug ('gary-teh') and redirects. (b) Unknown-vs-rebuilding distinction: on 404, check _cache/index.json — unknown slug shows immediate empty-state ('no practice events yet for this identity'); known slug falls back to the existing polling (cache rebuild in flight). Stops the 5-minute false-promise 'profile is being generated' polling loop on orphan URLs.
  - capoeira PR #30 — practice.html. CV link reveal is now gated on at-least-one-submitted practice (capoeira_session_history has any entry with submitted_at populated), not just on a keypair existing. Fixes the root cause of orphan URLs: previously the link was revealed the moment a fresh localStorage keypair existed, before any practice was completed, generating dead URLs that 404'd on truesight.me.
  - tokenomics PR #294 — practice_event_processing.gs. (a) Parser bug: capoeira-tribo-mirim practice events were landing with col M (Payload JSON) empty AND being committed to lineage-credentials with payload: null — making the CV show 0 minutes total despite source events carrying 40 + 42 minutes. Added a balanced-brace JSON extraction fallback that doesn't depend on the trailing '--------' sentinel at all. Diagnostic Logger.log on fallback/failure for future visibility. (b) Backfill functions: reprocessCredentialingRow(N) and reprocessAllRowsWithEmptyPayload() let the operator retroactively fix existing rows with empty col M. Idempotent.
  
  ## Architectural notes captured
  - Bug pattern: 'silent regex miss → empty intake column → null in committed event → cache aggregates to 0 → CV shows wrong number' is a 4-step chain where each step is honest about its inputs but the upstream miss propagates undetected. Diagnostic logging on the parser is what would have caught this at step 1.
  - Orphan-URL UX issue is structural: any browser-keypair-derived identifier system needs a 'have you actually done anything yet?' gate on the surface that links to the public profile. Now both the source (capoeira gate) and the destination (credentials empty-state) handle it correctly.
  
  ## Operator next step
  - Apps Script: clasp-push tokenomics PR #294 changes; run reprocessAllRowsWithEmptyPayload() once from the IDE. Rows 5 and 6 will re-commit with proper payload; the lineage-credentials GitHub Action re-runs build_cv_cache.py; the CV at truesight.me/credentials/#pk-4LBWHX9DJ_wH shows total_practice_minutes = 82 instead of 0.
  - DApp / capoeira: both already auto-deploy from main; refresh the pages to pick up.
  
  PRs:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/103
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/30
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/294
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
